offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, billing discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile billing data with project timesheets and email discrepancies to finance ops instead of manual reconciliation of billing and timesheet data.
problem: Discrepancies between billing data and project timesheets
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about invoicing issues
Direct message 20-50 freelancers with a demo video
Share insights in community forums for freelancers
try_it: Let users manually enter data for a few invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a call to action
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with potential users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminders for billing tasks
Enable CSV import for existing client data
